creator: langchain.com

evidence.text: Production traces. Every agent interaction generates a trace where failures become eval cases. Mining traces for eval material is the leverage, high-throughput way to improve evals over time. Even before running an agent over evals, often a team dogfooding our agent will report errors directly in Slack with a Trace link. We recommend dogfooding agents and directly sharing feedback for everyone to see, it helps build shared knowledge of agent behavior.

title: Better Harness: A Recipe for Harness Hill-Climbing with Evals
